requirements.title: Registry pre-populates all standard zones
requirements.text: A Registry created by NewRegistry shall contain controllers for ZoneFrontLeft, ZoneFrontRight, ZoneRearLeft, ZoneRearRight, and ZoneCentral.

requirements.title: Registry rejects duplicate zone registration
requirements.text: Registering a controller for a zone that is already registered shall return ErrAlreadyExists.

requirements.title: Registry deregisters and closes zone controller
requirements.text: Deregister shall remove the controller from the registry and call Close() on it. After deregistration, Lookup for the same zone shall return ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: Registry Lookup returns ErrNotFound for absent zone
requirements.text: Lookup for a zone that has no registered controller shall return ErrNotFound.

requirements.title: Registry Close idempotency
requirements.text: Registry.Close() shall be safe to call multiple times; subsequent calls shall be no-ops returning nil.

requirements.title: Registry Controllers returns all registered controllers
requirements.text: Controllers() shall return exactly the set of currently registered controllers.

requirements.title: Registry Register rejected after Close
requirements.text: Register called on a closed Registry shall return an error wrapping ErrClosed.

requirements.title: Controller Send default OK response
requirements.text: When no handler is configured, Controller.Send shall return a Response with StatusOK and CommandID equal to the command ID.

requirements.title: Controller Send dispatches to handler
requirements.text: When a handler is configured, Controller.Send shall invoke the handler and return its result.

requirements.title: Controller Send rejected after Close
requirements.text: Send called on a closed Controller shall return an error wrapping ErrClosed.

requirements.title: Controller Send respects cancelled context
requirements.text: If the context passed to Send is already cancelled, Send shall return an error wrapping ErrTimeout.

requirements.title: Controller Close idempotency
requirements.text: Controller.Close() shall be safe to call multiple times; subsequent calls shall be no-ops returning nil.

requirements.title: Controller Subscribe receives published status
requirements.text: A Status published via Publish shall be delivered to all active Subscribe channels within the controller.

requirements.title: Controller Subscribe channel closed on controller close
requirements.text: When Controller.Close() is called, all active Subscribe channels shall be closed.

requirements.title: Controller Subscribe rejected after Close
requirements.text: Subscribe called on a closed Controller shall return an error wrapping ErrClosed.

requirements.title: Controller Zone returns declared zone
requirements.text: Controller.Zone() shall return the Zone value provided at construction time.

requirements.title: Controller Subscribe sequence numbers strictly increasing
requirements.text: Successive Status updates published by Publish shall carry strictly increasing Seq values.

requirements.title: Zone String representation
requirements.text: Zone.String() shall return a unique, human-readable identifier for each defined zone constant.

requirements.title: ResponseStatus String representation
requirements.text: ResponseStatus.String() shall return a unique, human-readable identifier for each defined status constant.
